flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hardin-Simmons University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hardin-Simmons University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (51.6% → 46.0%).
